chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 105 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.770/2024 (C/A) 18.11.2025 Mr. Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.3 Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondent No.2 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Abdul Qadir Shaikh, Advocate appearing for Respondent No.3 submits that the order dated 27.08.2024 has been complied with and salaries have been released to the Petitioner. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner, the listed application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
